subject: App crashes every time I try to export data
body: Hi team, whenever I click the Export to CSV button in the Reports section, the app freezes for about 10 seconds and then crashes completely. This has been happening since yesterday's update. I've tried on Chrome and Firefox with the same result. This is blocking our entire accounting workflow.

subject: Wrong amount charged on March invoice
body: Hello, I was charged $599 this month but my plan is the Starter plan at $49/month. I see no upgrades on my end. Please refund the difference immediately. This is very frustrating.

subject: Can you add dark mode to the dashboard?
body: Hey! Love the product overall. One thing that would make a huge difference for me and my team is a dark mode option for the main dashboard. We work late nights and it strains our eyes. Would love to see this in an upcoming release!

subject: We're evaluating whether to continue our subscription
body: Hi, I'm the new operations manager here. We've been reviewing our software costs and I've been asked to evaluate whether this tool is providing enough ROI. Our team uses it but I'm not sure the value justifies the price. Could someone reach out to walk me through what we're getting?

subject: How do I add a second user to my account?
body: Hi, I want to add my colleague to the account so we can both access the dashboard. I looked through settings but couldn't find where to do this. Can you help?

subject: URGENT: Production API is returning 500 errors
body: Our production integration is completely broken. Every call to your API is returning HTTP 500. We have 3000 active users affected right now. This is a P0 incident on our side. Please escalate immediately.

subject: I think I was double-charged last month
body: Hi there. I noticed two charges from your company on my credit card statement in February — one on the 1st and one on the 15th. Is this normal or was I charged twice by mistake?

subject: Thinking about downgrading our plan
body: Hello, we signed up for the Pro plan 6 months ago but we're honestly not using most of the features. Our team is small and we just need the basics. I'm seriously considering moving to the free tier or finding an alternative solution.

subject: Would love an integration with Notion
body: Hi team! We use Notion for all our documentation and it would be amazing if we could sync our data directly into Notion pages. Is this on your roadmap? Would be a game changer for our workflow.

subject: Where can I find my usage reports?
body: Hello, I need to pull a usage report for our leadership meeting tomorrow. I can see the dashboard but I'm not sure where the reports section is. Is there documentation on this?

body: Love the product! A dark mode option would make a huge difference for my team. We work late nights and it strains our eyes. Keep up the great work!

subject: Haven't received the promised onboarding call
body: Hi, when we signed up last month we were told we'd get an onboarding call within the first week. It's been 5 weeks and nobody has reached out. We're still trying to figure out how to use some of the advanced features on our own.

subject: Would love an integration with Notion
body: Hi team! We use Notion for all our documentation and it would be amazing if we could sync our data directly into Notion pages. Is this on your roadmap? Would be a game changer!

subject: Response time has been really slow lately
body: We've noticed that dashboard load times have increased significantly over the past 2 weeks. Our team is getting frustrated. We pay for the Pro plan specifically for performance. If this doesn't improve we'll need to look at alternatives.

subject: How do I export my data?
body: Hi, I want to export all our historical data from the platform. Could you point me to how to do this? We might need it for a report we're preparing.

churn_signals: data export request can precede leaving

subject: Need to pause our subscription for 2 months
body: Hi, we're going through a budget freeze and need to pause our subscription temporarily for 2 months. Is that something you can accommodate? We do want to come back after things settle down.
